checklist.name: Invocation and size constraints
checklist.description: Explains the size implications for the prompted QR/NFC venue entry and demo-link requirements. Award full credit if the answer says physical QR/NFC invocations have a smaller App Clip size budget than iOS 17+ digital-only flows, demo links can use the current larger limit for testing, and final sizing should be verified with the App Thinning Size Report.

checklist.name: Large media feasibility
checklist.description: Warns that large bundled videos, large media catalogs, or downloads required before useful check-in work are poor App Clip fits. Award full credit if the answer moves those requirements to streaming/server-backed content, post-task assets, or the full app.

checklist.name: CloudKit boundary
checklist.description: States that venue data in the App Clip can use CloudKit public database reads with `CloudKit-Anonymous` on iOS 16+, but public writes, iCloud Documents, key-value storage, private/shared containers, full CloudKit sync, or durable offline state belong outside the App Clip. Award full credit for equivalent wording that keeps CloudKit use read-only/public and moves durable sync or writes out of the App Clip.

checklist.name: Live Activity boundary
checklist.description: Explains that Live Activities can belong to the App Clip only through an App Clip-only widget extension that contains only Live Activities and uses the App Clip Extension capability / `com.apple.developer.on-demand-install-capable`. Award full credit if the answer also keeps detailed ActivityKit or WidgetKit implementation in sibling guidance.

checklist.name: Prompted unsupported features
checklist.description: Addresses the prompted unsupported features explicitly. Award full credit if the answer says App Intents/Siri start, in-app purchases, BackgroundTasks cleanup, SKAdNetwork/ad attribution, App Tracking Transparency tracking prompts, and custom URL schemes are not App Clip runtime features and should move to the full app or an appropriate sibling domain.

checklist.name: Sibling and full-app handoff
checklist.description: Keeps the review at App Clip feasibility and boundary level. Award full credit if the answer routes StoreKit purchases, BackgroundTasks cleanup, CloudKit schema/sync, ActivityKit/WidgetKit details, and full-app implementation work to sibling or full-app domains without expanding into detailed implementation.
